entities.name: SADC
entities.description: Southern African Development Community, a regional intergovernmental organization

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, an international agricultural research center

entities.name: SORGHUM AND MILLET IMPROVEMENT PROGRAM
entities.description: A collaborative program between SADC and ICRISAT focused on the improvement of sorghum and millet

entities.name: ECONOMICS RESEARCH
entities.description: The study of economic factors related to the production, marketing, and adoption of agricultural crops

entities.name: GRAIN MARKET RESEARCH
entities.description: Research focused on the dynamics, pricing, and efficiency of grain markets

entities.name: INDUSTRY DEMAND
entities.description: The level of demand for agricultural products from industrial processors and users

entities.name: RURAL MARKETS
entities.description: Local markets in rural areas where agricultural products are traded

entities.name: DEHULLERS
entities.description: Mechanical devices used to remove the outer husk of sorghum and pearl millet grains

entities.name: ADOPTION AND IMPACT STUDIES
entities.description: Research evaluating the uptake of agricultural technologies and their subsequent effects on farmers

entities.name: CROP BREEDING PROGRAMMES
entities.description: Systematic efforts to develop improved crop varieties with desirable traits

entities.name: SEED MARKET ANALYSIS
entities.description: The study of the supply, demand, and pricing of seeds in the agricultural market

entities.name: REGIONAL SEED POLICIES
entities.description: Regulations and guidelines governing seed production, quality, and trade within a region

entities.name: FERTILITY MANAGEMENT RESEARCH
entities.description: Research on optimizing soil nutrients and fertility for improved crop growth

entities.name: HUMAN RESOURCE DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of improving the skills, knowledge, and capabilities of personnel in the agricultural sector
